0.name: Curso Consolas y Dispositivos de Videojuegos
0.summary:
This educational resource is designed to provide learners with a comprehensive understanding of video game consoles and their associated hardware. It systematically explores the fundamental components, architectural designs, and operational principles that define various generations of gaming systems.

Furthermore, the content delves into the diverse range of input, output, and specialized peripheral devices used in interactive digital entertainment. The objective is to familiarize individuals with the technological foundations and functional characteristics of these dedicated electronic devices.

1.name: Presentación y normas de la asignatura
1.summary:
This resource provides an introductory overview of an academic subject or course. It details the essential components, including its scope, objectives, and pedagogical approach, to establish a foundational understanding of what the subject entails.

Furthermore, the resource delineates the operational guidelines and expectations for participation within the course. It covers the rules governing student conduct, assessment procedures, submission requirements, and other administrative protocols necessary for successful engagement with the subject material.

2.name: Curso "From Nand to Tetris"
2.summary:
This learning experience provides a comprehensive journey into the foundational principles of computer science and engineering. Participants will embark on a hands-on project to construct a complete, general-purpose computer system from first principles, gaining deep insights into how modern computing machines are designed and operate.

The curriculum guides learners through the creation of all essential layers of a computer, beginning with elementary logic gates like NAND, progressing to the design of complex digital circuits, and ultimately building a functional Central Processing Unit (CPU) and memory unit. Beyond hardware, the program extends to the development of software components, including an assembler, a virtual machine, and a high-level language compiler, culminating in the implementation of a full-fledged operating system and a playable application.

3.name: nandgame
3.summary:
This resource provides an interactive learning experience focused on the foundational principles of digital electronics. Learners will acquire a practical understanding of how a universal logic gate operates and its role as a fundamental building block in digital systems.

The primary objective is to enable users to construct and analyze basic digital circuits using only this single type of gate. Through hands-on experimentation, participants will grasp concepts such as Boolean algebra, truth tables, and the methodology for synthesizing more complex logic functions, including other standard logic gates, from a singular universal element. This experiential approach aims to illuminate the core mechanisms underlying computing hardware.

4.name: Diapositivas Álgebra Boole
4.summary:
This educational resource offers an instructional presentation on the principles of Boolean algebra. It is designed to introduce learners to the core concepts, axioms, and theorems that define this fundamental algebraic system. The material aims to develop a foundational understanding of logical operations, their symbolic representation, and their application in simplifying complex logical expressions.

Upon completion, learners should be able to identify and apply Boolean operators, construct and interpret truth tables, and manipulate Boolean expressions to achieve logical equivalence. This resource serves as a comprehensive primer for students new to the subject.

5.name: Instrucciones entregable laboratorio 1
5.summary:
This document provides a comprehensive set of instructions designed to guide learners through the requirements and procedures for a specific practical assignment. It details the expected format, content, and submission criteria, ensuring clarity for successful completion.

The resource outlines the steps necessary for the first laboratory deliverable. It aims to enable students to understand how to effectively prepare and present their work according to established academic and practical standards.

6.name: Paquete herramientas nand2tetris.zip
6.summary:
This resource provides a comprehensive collection of software utilities essential for engaging with the "nand2tetris" educational project. It aims to equip learners with the necessary computational environment and programs required to implement a full computer system, from elementary logic gates to a high-level programming language and a basic operating system.

The included tools are designed to facilitate the practical exercises and assignments outlined in the "Elements of Computing Systems" curriculum. Users will be able to compile hardware description language files, write and assemble machine code, and simulate the designed hardware and software components, thereby gaining hands-on experience in computer architecture and systems programming.

7.name: Álgebra de Boole I
7.summary:
This resource introduces the foundational concepts and principles of Boolean algebra. Learners will explore the basic operations, axioms, and theorems that define this algebraic structure. The content is designed to establish a comprehensive understanding of how logical variables and operations are formally represented and manipulated, forming the bedrock for digital systems and computational logic.

Further, the module delves into the practical application of these theoretical constructs, providing the initial framework necessary for analyzing and designing digital circuits. Emphasis is placed on developing problem-solving skills related to simplifying logical expressions and understanding their equivalence, preparing students for more advanced topics in digital electronics and computer architecture.
